title: eucalyptus × rigida var. luehmanniana
intro: Eucalyptus × rigida var. luehmanniana, also known as Lemon-scented Gum, is a hybrid eucalyptus species native to Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its decongestant and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of eucalyptol and other volatile oils. The health benefits of Eucalyptus × rigida var. luehmanniana include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and colds, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate muscle and joint pain. Eucalyptus × rigida var. luehmanniana is often used in herbal preparations, including essential oils, salves, and infusions, which can be used topically or inhaled to harness its medicinal properties.
